'''sayada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zechut|zechut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zechut|zechut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sayada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæyædæth|sæyædæth]] || [[word:sæyædæj|sæyædæj]] || [[word:sæyædæsh|sæyædæsh]] || [[word:sæyædæ|sæyædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sayayadath|sayayadath]] || [[word:sayayadaj|sayayadaj]] || [[word:sayayadash|sayayadash]] || [[word:sayayada|sayayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sayadath|sayadath]] || [[word:sayadaj|sayadaj]] || [[word:sayadash|sayadash]] || [[word:sayada|sayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sayafdath|sayafdath]] || [[word:sayafdaj|sayafdaj]] || [[word:sayafdash|sayafdash]] || [[word:sayafdaf|sayafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sayadatha|sayadatha]] || [[word:sayadaja|sayadaja]] || [[word:sayadasha|sayadasha]] || [[word:sayadaka|sayadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sayadath|sayadath]] || [[word:sayadaj|sayadaj]] || [[word:sayadash|sayadash]] || [[word:sayada|sayada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sayadathal|sayadathal]] || [[word:sayadajal|sayadajal]] || [[word:sayadashal|sayadashal]] || [[word:sayadakal|sayadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sayadathatha|sayadathatha]] || [[word:sayadajaja|sayadajaja]] || [[word:sayadashasha|sayadashasha]] || [[word:sayadaka|sayadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sayadathan|sayadathan]] || [[word:sayadajan|sayadajan]] || [[word:sayadashan|sayadashan]] || [[word:sayadakan|sayadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sayadathaoro|sayadathaoro]] || [[word:sayadajaoro|sayadajaoro]] || [[word:sayadashaoro|sayadashaoro]] || [[word:sayadakaoro|sayadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
